title: Paranura mjohjangensis Deharveng & Weiner 1984
author: Smolis, Adrian
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: Paranura mjohjangensis  Deharveng & Weiner, 1984   Figs 59, 65   New localities . 1 ex. on slide, Russia: Primorye, Khualaza, crest below the steep part, 19.IX.2004, forest litter, Berlese extraction, leg. L. Deharveng & A. Bedos X=132.783957, Y=43.108999, altitude 1000 m, (RU-026); 6 ex. on slides, ibid, Khualaza, area more flat, 19.IX.2004, forest litter & rotten wood, Berlese extraction, leg. L. Deharveng & A. Bedos, X=132.783957, Y=43.108999, altitude 1000 m, (RU-029); 3 ex. on slides, ibid: Khualaza, at the 2nd pass, 19.IX.2004, forest, litter, Berlese extraction, leg. L. Deharveng & A. Bedos, X = 132.787742, Y=43.117823, altitude 750 m, (RU-032); 3 ex. on slides, ibid: Pedan, rhododendron below boulder, 21.IX.2014, forest, soil, humus, Berlese extraction, leg. L. Deharveng & A. Bedos, X=132.716369, Y=43.100119, altitude 450 m. (RU-072); 1 ex. on slide, ibid: Nakhodka: near grotte 4, 25.IX.2004, bush, soil, Berlese extraction, leg. L. Deharveng & A. Bedos, X=133.072796, Y=42.947045, altitude 40 m, (RU-090); 3 ex. on slides, ibid: Ekaterinovka, Chandalaz range, Chandalaz Range crest, 26.IX.2004, forest, litter, Berlese extraction, leg. L. Deharveng & A. Bedos, X=133.021815, Y=43.025770, altitude 500 m, (RU-102).
